subcodes.first_line: O thou who art recipient of divine bounties! In the glorious Qur'án, addressing the Beauty of Muhammad, it is said: "Perchance thy Lord will raise thee to a praised station." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستفیض در مقام محمود در قرآن عظیم بجمال محمدی خطاب عسی ان یبعثک ربک مقام
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @station of the Manifestation of God, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @Manifestation of God as sun
